data.title: Trump hits Iran with more oil sanctions under ‘maximum pressure’ policy
data.description:
The White House announced new sanctions against Iran’s oil network on Thursday, piling more pressure on Tehran’s economy as President Trump pushes forward with his maximum pressure policy. The penalties, confirmed by the Treasury and State departments, target dozens of companies and tankers accused of secretly helping Iran sell billions in oil under fake identities. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/trump-hits-iran-with-more-oil-sanctions/

data.title: Bitcoin Mining Firms Face Production Challenges Amid Texas Power Curtailment
data.description:
According to Cointelegraph, several Bitcoin mining companies experienced a decline in production during June, primarily due to power curtailment measures in Texas. Riot Platforms reported a 12% decrease in Bitcoin production, mining 450 BTC compared to 514 BTC in May. Riot CEO Jason Les highlighted the company's power strategy, which includes economic curtailment and participation in the Electric Reliability Council of Texas’s Four Coincident Peak (4CP) and other demand response programs. This approach, he noted, significantly contributes to grid stability while enhancing Riot's competitive positioning.

The 4CP program, which began in June, is a tariff designed to manage peak electricity demand during the summer months. Large electricity consumers, such as Bitcoin miners, face transmission charges based on their usage during these peak periods, prompting them to voluntarily curtail operations. Riot also disclosed that it sold 397 BTC for $41.7 million and currently holds 19,273 Bitcoin.

Cipher Mining also reported a decrease in production, mining 160 BTC in June. The company sold 58 BTC and holds 1,063 Bitcoin. Cipher attributed the reduced production to its proactive 4CP avoidance strategy, which allowed it to avoid costly penalties and maintain low power costs. Despite the strategic curtailment, Cipher's Black Pearl facility in Texas began contributing to production at the end of June.

MARA Holdings experienced a 25% reduction in production, mining 211 Bitcoin compared to 282 in May. As of June 30, MARA held 49,940 BTC and did not sell any during the month. CEO Fred Thiel cited reduced uptime due to weather-related curtailment and the temporary deployment of older machines at its Garden City, Texas, facility as reasons for the decline. He also mentioned natural variability in block luck as a contributing factor.

In contrast, CleanSpark increased its Bitcoin production by 6.7% in June, surpassing its mid-year hashrate target of 20 exahashes per second (EH/s). The company produced 445 Bitcoin and sold only 8, bringing its total holdings to 6,591 Bitcoin by the end of the month. This increase in production sets CleanSpark apart from other mining firms facing challenges due to power curtailment in Texas.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Holdings Concentrated Among Top Wallets
data.description: According to PANews, recent data from Santiment reveals that the top ten wallets holding USD Coin possess only 27% of its total supply. In comparison, Chainlink's top wallets hold 32% of its supply. Shiba Inu shows the highest concentration, with its top ten wallets holding 62% of the total supply.

data.title: Stablecoin Concept Stocks Experience Intraday Volatility and Gains
data.description: According to PANews, the stablecoin concept stocks saw intraday fluctuations and subsequent gains. Jingbei Fang reached its daily limit, setting a new record high for its stock price. Earlier, Jinyi Culture also hit its daily limit. Other companies such as Xinyada, GCL Energy Technology, Hope Co., Tianyang Technology, Zhengyuan Wisdom, and Langxin Group experienced significant increases in their stock prices.

data.title: Dogecoin Bounces Back With 8% Gain—Is $0.26 In Sight?
data.description:
Dogecoin has observed a rebound from the support line of a Parallel Channel. Here’s where the next target could lie, according to an analyst. Dogecoin Found Support At Lower Level Of This Channel In a new post on X, analyst Ali Martinez has talked about how the daily Dogecoin price is currently looking from the perspective of a technical analysis (TA) pattern. The pattern in question is a Parallel Channel, which forms whenever an asset’s price witnesses consolidation between two parallel trendlines
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/dogecoin/dogecoin-bounces-back-with-8-gain-is-0-26-in-sight/

data.title: Ether gains 0.55% as strong US jobs data lifts S&P 500, Nasdaq to records
data.description:
Ether (ETH) traded steadily around $2,584 (+0. 55%) as risk assets rallied on strong US jobs data. US economy added 147,000 jobs in June (beating 110K forecast); S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit new record highs. US Congress passed President Trump’s $4
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/ether-gains-0-55-as-strong-us-jobs-data-lifts-sp-500-nasdaq-to-records/

data.title: IRS Faulted Over Crypto Seizure Records — Here’s What to Know
data.description:
The IRS’s criminal division is under scrutiny for poor documentation and oversight of billions in seized crypto assets, a watchdog report has found.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/irs-faulted-over-crypto-seizure-records/

data.title: Significant Gains in Digital Currency and Stablecoin Stocks in Hong Kong and A-Share Markets
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, digital currency and stablecoin concept stocks in the Hong Kong and A-share markets experienced notable gains today. Guotai Junan International (01788.HK) saw an increase of over 19% after receiving approval to offer cryptocurrency and virtual asset trading services. Duodian Digital (02586.HK) rose by more than 18.49% following its announcement of preparing to apply for a Hong Kong stablecoin license.

Huaxing Capital Holdings (01911.HK) gained over 6% as it plans to invest $100 million in developing Web3 businesses and investing in crypto assets. Victory Securities (08540.HK) increased by more than 5.8% after announcing it had received two virtual asset business approvals from the Hong Kong Securities and Futures Commission.

In the A-share market, Jingbei Fang (002987.SZ) hit the daily limit with a 10% increase. Huafeng Superfiber (300180.SZ) rose by 4.11%, Lakala (300773.SZ) saw a 3.22% increase, and Sifang Jingchuang (300468.SZ) gained 6.36%.

data.title: PLUME's short-term increase expanded to 8.9%, with Gate trading accounting for the largest share
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Coingecko data, PLUME's short-term increase expanded to 8.9%, currently at $0.1149. Gate's transaction share ranks first in the world.

data.title: JD.com and Ant Group suggest that the central bank approve RMB stablecoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Reuters, citing people familiar with the matter, JD.com and Ant Group recently proposed to the People's Bank of China to approve the issuance of RMB-based stablecoins. JD.com pointed out in a closed-door discussion that it is urgent to promote the landing of offshore RMB stablecoins as a key tool to promote the internationalization of RMB. There are also reports that Ant Group is preparing to apply for stablecoin-related licenses in Hong Kong and Singapore to make preliminary preparations for the issuance of offshore RMB stablecoins. (Sina Finance)

data.title: Whale Continues Shorting Bitcoin Despite Liquidations
data.description: According to Foresight News, monitoring by Lookonchain reveals that the whale known as qwatio has resumed shorting Bitcoin after experiencing ten liquidations. The entity recently opened a short position of 21 BTC, valued at approximately $2.3 million, at the $109,135 mark. The whale's strategy involves shorting at low levels, facing liquidation, and then repeating the process.

data.title: Solana Staking ETF Sees Strong Inflow on First Trading Day
data.description:
According to Odaily, the Rex-Osprey Solana+Staking ETF (SSK), the first staking-based Solana exchange-traded fund listed in the United States, attracted approximately $12 million in inflows on its debut trading day at the Cboe BZX Exchange. A spokesperson from REX Shares and Osprey Funds revealed that the ETF aims to provide returns to investors by staking at least half of its assets.

Earlier reports indicated that the ETF's first-day trading volume reached $33 million, outperforming Solana futures ETFs, XRP futures ETFs, and the average performance of standard ETFs. Despite this promising start, Bitwise's senior investment strategist Juan Leon noted that institutional interest in Solana's investment potential remains in its early stages.

data.title: Coinbase: The planned system upgrade on August 2 may affect deposit and withdrawal functions for about three hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase announced that it will upgrade its system at 7:00 a.m. Pacific Time (23:00 Beijing Time) on Saturday, August 2. At that time, simple and advanced transactions, deposits and withdrawals, as well as fund transfers from Coinbase and the use of Coinbase Card will be affected and unavailable, and fund transfers will be delayed. The estimated time range of the impact is about three hours.

data.title: Japanese digital bank Minna Bank launches stablecoin research project
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Japan's first digital bank, Minna Bank, announced that it will cooperate with Fireblocks, Solana Japan and TIS to conduct joint research to explore the feasibility of issuing stablecoins based on the Solana blockchain and evaluate its practical application potential in cross-border payments, physical asset transactions and daily financial services. The project will also study how Web3 wallets can enhance user payment experience. As the global stablecoin market value exceeds US$250 billion, traditional institutions in Japan, including SMBC, are also accelerating their layout, intending to use stablecoins to improve fund settlement efficiency and serve trade finance needs. (Decrypt)

data.title: Most crypto sectors rose, while BTC and ETH fluctuated in a narrow range
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On July 4, according to SoSoValue data, affected by the combined factors of June non-agricultural data exceeding expectations, most of the crypto market sectors maintained a slight upward trend. Among them, Bitcoin (BTC) rose 0.47% in 24 hours, maintaining around $109,000, and Ethereum (ETH) rose 0.41%, fluctuating narrowly around the $2,600 mark. In addition, the NFT sector rose 1.92%. Within the sector, Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) rose 6.78%; the Meme sector rose 1.58%, Bonk (BONK) rose again 3.70%, and Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) rose 6.72%.
In other sectors, the PayFi sector rose 0.56% in 24 hours, among which Litecoin (LTC) and Stellar (XLM) rose 1.31% and 1.76% respectively; the Layer1 sector rose 0.32%, Cardano (ADA) and Sui (SUI) rose 1.77% and 4.30% respectively; the DeFi sector rose 0.10%, and Uniswap (UNI) rose 3.02%; the CeFi sector rose 0.08%, and the Layer2 sector fell 0.55%, but Celestia (TIA) was relatively strong, rising 1.43% in 24 hours.
The crypto sector index reflecting the historical market conditions of the sector shows that the ssiNFT, ssiMeme, and ssiDeFi indexes rose 2.21%, 1.48%, and 0.91% in 24 hours respectively.

data.title: Data: The pledged SOL ETF SSK attracted $12 million in capital inflows on its first day of listing
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The first US-listed pledged Solana exchange-traded fund, Rex-Osprey Solana+Staking ETF (SSK), attracted about $12 million in capital inflows on the first day of trading on the Cboe BZX exchange. According to spokespersons for REX Shares and Osprey Funds, the ETF will provide investors with returns by staking at least half of the fund's assets.
Earlier news, the REX-OSPREY Solana pledged ETF's first-day trading volume reached $33 million, which was better than the average performance of Solana futures ETFs and XRP futures ETFs and ordinary ETFs, but Juan Leon, senior investment strategist at Bitwise, pointed out that institutional investors' investment potential in SOL is still in its early stages. (Cryptorank)

data.title: Japan's Minna Bank Explores Stablecoins on Solana in Fireblocks-Led Study
data.description:
The study will examine whether stablecoins are suitable for modernizing payments and cross-border finance in Japan.
source: https://decrypt.co/328372/japans-minna-bank-stablecoins-solana-fireblocks-study

data.title: FTX creditor representative: Chinese users may lose their right to claim compensation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Sunil, a representative of FTX creditors, posted on the X platform that FTX is seeking legal advice to distribute to restricted foreign jurisdictions. However, if it is determined that the user belongs to a restricted foreign jurisdiction, the claim will be disputed, and if the issue is not resolved, (the user) will lose the right to distribute. Sunil said that 5% of the claims involve restricted countries and 82% of the claimed funds belong to Chinese users.
